originalTitle: EasyJet boss says summer flights won't be hit by jet fuel shortages
summary: The airline has seen no problems with fuel, but says people are booking later because of uncertainty caused by the Iran war.
content: The airline has seen no problems with fuel, but says people are booking later because of uncertainty caused by the Iran war.
